name: Norris Industries, Inc.
business: Norris Industries, Inc. focuses on the acquisition, development, and production of crude oil and natural gas properties in Texas. The company sells crude oil and natural gas to refineries and gas pipelines. It operates as a small exploration and production company in the oil and gas industry.

exposures.sentence: The Company was formed to conduct operations in the oil and gas industry, and currently focuses on the development, production and maintenance of its existing crude oil and natural gas properties in Texas.
